description: Canonical registry of all drift events detected across mirrors. Drift occurs when a mirror's reflected behavior diverges from its source system's actual behavior beyond acceptable tolerance thresholds. Each record captures the nature, severity, and resolution status of a drift event.

record_schema.drift_id: string — Unique identifier for the drift event (DRIFT-XXXX-NNNN)
record_schema.mirror_id: string — Reference to the mirror where drift was detected
record_schema.slice_id: string|null — Reference to the specific slice, if applicable
record_schema.detected_by: string — System or operator that detected the drift
record_schema.summary: string — Human-readable summary of the drift
record_schema.details: object — Structured details of the drift including expected vs actual values
record_schema.resolution: object|null — Resolution details including action taken and resolved_at
record_schema.approved_divergence: object|null — If drift is approved as acceptable divergence, includes approver and justification
record_schema.related_drift_ids: array — References to related drift events
